events.title: Public Hearing - Education Parcel Tax
events.location: 960 Ygnacio Valley Road, Walnut Creek, CA 94596
events.description: Public hearing by Walnut Creek School District governing board regarding calling an election to levy new $98 education parcel tax

events.title: Public Hearing: Election to Levy Education Parcel Tax
events.location: District office, 960 Ygnacio Valley Road, Walnut Creek, CA 94596
events.description: NOTICE OF PUBLIC HEARING REGARDING CALLING AN ELECTION TO LEVY NEW EDUCATION PARCEL TAX. Notice is hereby given pursuant to Government Code Section 50077 that a public hearing will be held by the governing board of the Walnut Creek School District at a board meeting on February 23, 2026, at 6:00 p.m., or as soon thereafter as convenient, at the District office, located at 960 Ygnacio Valley Road, Walnut Creek, CA 94596. The purpose of said hearing is to receive public comment regarding whether the District should call an election to create a new $98 parcel tax for nine years, with annual inflation, adjustments, pursuant to Government Code Section 50079. Any interested persons, including all persons owning lands in the District, may appear and be heard at the public hearing. Walnut Creek School District Governing Board 960 Ygnacio Valley Road, Walnut Creek, CA 94596
